Add front page to the report

Source: R/report.R
add_front_page.Rd

Inserts a professional cover page with the AlgAware logo, report title, issue number, diary number placeholder, cruise information, and cruise phytoplankton group-composition map. Mosaics are placed on the following page via add_mosaic_overview().

Usage

add_front_page(
  doc,
  cleanup,
  taxa_lookup = NULL,
  cruise_info = "",
  report_number = NULL,
  report_dnr = NULL,
  image_counts = NULL,
  group_map_plot = NULL
)

Arguments

doc

An rdocx object.

cleanup

Environment with a files character vector.

taxa_lookup

Optional taxa lookup table with italic column.

cruise_info

Cruise information string (e.g. "RV Svea March cruise, 2026-03-15 to 2026-03-22").

report_number

Optional report issue number (e.g. "1").

report_dnr

Optional diarienummer string (e.g. "2026-1234").

image_counts

Optional image counts data for the cruise track map.

group_map_plot

Optional phytoplankton group composition pie map for the front page.

Value

The modified rdocx object.
